EmailTemplate.description: Email to be used for customers for the main FUL product where they have asked to be removed from auto renewal because they want their policy to expire.
EmailTemplate.name: Cancel Auto Renewal Email (FUL Package incl ROC)
EmailTemplate.subject: Cancellation of your Policy Renewal
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for getting in touch with Kingsbridge.
We’re sorry to hear you do not wish to renew your policy with us this year. To honour your cancellation request, please rest assured that your policy has now been removed from auto-renewal.
The period your policy is active (DDMMYYYY to DDMMYYYY).
We understand that there can be many reasons why you may not want to continue keeping your business covered with Kingsbridge. However, there are some common situations that we see cancellation requests arise from, and we want to make sure you’re fully aware of the financial risks that can present from not holding current business insurance if any apply to you.
Not currently working?
If you are not currently working, we would discourage you from cancelling your policy; unless you’re stopping self-employment altogether, a break in cover could affect your business. Our automatic renewal process is in place to ensure you are continuously protected.
Your package policy includes Professional Indemnity and Directors’ and Officers’ cover. These elements of the policy work on a ‘claims made’ basis, meaning you must have cover in place at the time of the claim and not at the time of the incident for your policy to provide cover.
(Use if for IR35 Add On) IR35 Protect operates on a ‘claims made’ basis, so the policy must be active to respond to most claims. However, for sections 10-12 on your policy there is a 4-year extended reporting period for you to notify us of a claim for an investigation during the period your policy was active. Any claim in these sections must be notified to insurers within 30 days of an insured event taking place and before any response to HMRC. Your appointed representation will work with you to respond and manage communications with HMRC.
(Use for Legal Expenses) Legal Expenses cover operates on a ‘claims made’ basis and therefore the policy must be live in order to respond in the majority of claims. However, for section 10 on your policy there is a 4-year extended reporting period for you to notify us of a claim for an investigation during the period your policy was active. Any claim in these sections must be notified to insurers within 30 days of an insured event taking place and before any response to HMRC. Your appointed representation will work with you to respond and manage communications with HMRC.
(Use for Cyber Liability Add On) Cyber Liability cover operates on a ‘claims made’ basis and therefore the policy must be live in order to respond in the majority of claims. For some sections of the cover however, you can notify us of a claim up to 30 days following your policy expiry date. Please see your policy wording for full details.
If you choose to cancel your Kingsbridge insurance policy and do not hold alternative cover elsewhere your business will not be covered against claims of negligence and you could find yourself held accountable if the business is ever accused of financial mismanagement, a health and safety failure, a breach of legislation or of breaking company law.
As mentioned above, if you still wish to cancel your policy you’ll no longer able to claim on the Professional Indemnity part of your policy – we want to take the opportunity to make you aware that this may put your business at risk from claims. However, there are still ways you can proactively manage this risk for continued peace of mind.
One such way to keep your business protected is a product called Run-Off Cover that helps you to avoid any gap in cover. I’ve attached information on Kingsbridge’s Run-Off Cover for your interest, and you can simply reply to this email if you would like to learn more or to proceed with purchasing a Run-Off policy.
Found cover elsewhere?
You might qualify for our Price Promise – where we will beat any like for like quote. For full details and terms and conditions, please click here.
Simply reply to this email detailing the cover levels and the quoted price you have received or attach your quotation documents. We’ll then give you a call to discuss your updated renewal price.
If you’ve changed your mind about cancelling your cover after having read the above information and would instead like your policy to renew, please reply to this email and our customer service team will be happy to help.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
